title: Mattie Fresno and the Holoflux Universe
original_title: Mattie Fresno and the Holoflux Universe
overview: Mattie endures an uneventful life, until her grandfather leaves a videotaped will. According to his unorthodox theory, death is no barrier to their relationship and he promises to "always be there", triggering a series of hallucinations.
